headline: Assessing Moderna (MRNA) Valuation After Flu Vaccine Trial Success And Hantavirus Research Attention
summary: Moderna (MRNA) is back in focus after Phase 3 data showed its mRNA flu vaccine outperformed standard shots in older adults, while separate hantavirus research tied to a cruise ship outbreak added further attention. See our latest analysis for Moderna. The latest flu and hantavirus updates come after a powerful run, with the stock showing a 58.91% year-to-date share price return and a very large 1-year total shareholder return. However, longer-term total shareholder returns over 3 and 5 years...

headline: Hantavirus: Is there a risk of another pandemic?
summary: Investing.com -- Moderna Inc (NASDAQ:MRNA) shares rallied 13% over a multi-day period following reports of a localized Hantavirus outbreak aboard the cruise vessel MV Hondius.

headline: Salesforce Pushes Agentic AI Into Core Workflows With New Deployments
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) is rolling out new agentic AI deployments across core enterprise workflows. The company has launched Agentforce Contact Center with Ribbon Communications and AI-driven communications integrations at scale. Salesforce has partnered with Moderna to support global operations through Agentforce Life Sciences. The company has also introduced new e-signature integrations with Syncfusion to extend workflow coverage. These moves put Salesforce's AI platform directly into front...
